name: codezone
description: A comprehensive collaboration platform for programming teams

scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.db:migrate: npm run prisma migrate dev -w backend
scripts.db:seed: npm run prisma db seed -w backend
